body:
]> 23/07/2026 7:44 The Mountain Weather Continues.

The snowstake recorded 2cm of fresh snow overnight and the mountain weather will continue. We're in for a mixed bag today: currently there's some high cloud about, visibility is good (but that may change throughout the day), and the wind is a strong north-westerly, gusting up to 50km/h in the Valley and over 70km/h up top.

The forecast is calling for cloud, snow showers and strong westerly winds 25-40km/h, decreasing as the day progresse and we're headed for a top of 1 degrees

There are 29 groomed runs across the resort, with the snow surface likely fairly hard-packed. 28 lifts are scheduled to spin, however the wind may impact some lift operations today, so keep an eye on the lift status report and Perisher App for all the latest updates and real-time lift status.

Around the resort, we're into day 3 of the ACT and Regional NSW Interschools, with racing continuing today on Front Valley, Leichhardt and Mid Station.

We have the Three Peaks Demo in town, with some great brands set up at the bottom of Mt P6 today andmdash; so if you're in the market for some new gear, or just want to try out the latest tech, go check it out! We also have live music from 12pm at Jax and from 1pm at Blue Cow, bringing the vibes to the mountain. Check the Events page or follow Perisher's socials to stay across all the action.

]]> weather-blank Kosciuszko Road: Chains are required between Prussian Creek and Perisher.

Guthega Road: Road open to Guthega.

Alpine Way: Road open to Bullocks Flat, Skitube.

]]> Kosciuszko Road: Chains are required between Prussian Creek and Perisher.

]]> Guthega Road: Road open to Guthega.

]]> Alpine Way: Road open to Bullocks Flat, Skitube.

]]> 69.3 2 2 28 0 29 *Natural snow depth is supplemented with snowmaking in certain areas. Natural snow depth is measured at roughly 1,830m by Snowy Hydro Limited who have invested in new instrumentation across the Snowy Scheme and can now provide more frequent snow depth readings at a site close to the Spencers Creek snow course. This report reflects conditions at the date and time of this report. Conditions, lifts status and operations subsequent to this report may differ.
